org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class ConfigParsers

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.ConfigParsers

  • public final class ConfigParsers
extends java.lang.Object
    Parsers to set the value of configuration variables.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.lang.String toAlphaNum(java.lang.String... args)
      Parses the set command arguments into a single alphanumeric word.

      Parses the set command arguments into a single alphanumeric word.

      Parses the set command arguments into a float.

      Parses the set command arguments into an IPv4 address.

      Parses the set command arguments into a long.

      • toFile

        public static java.lang.String toFile(java.lang.String... args)
        Parses the set command arguments into a file path string. The file may not exist.
        Parameters:
        args - the command arguments
        Returns:
        the path string represented by the first argument

      • toDirectory

        public static java.lang.String toDirectory(java.lang.String... args)
        Parses the set command arguments into a directory path string. The directory may not exist.
        Parameters:
        args - the command arguments
        Returns:
        the path string represented by the first argument

      • toExistingFile

        public static java.lang.String toExistingFile(java.lang.String... args)
        Parses the set command arguments into an existing file path string. The file must exist.
        Parameters:
        args - the command arguments
        Returns:
        the path string represented by the first argument

      • toExistingDirectory

        public static java.lang.String toExistingDirectory(java.lang.String... args)
        Parses the set command arguments into an existing directory path string. The directory must exist.
        Parameters:
        args - the command arguments
        Returns:
        the path string represented by the first argument

      • toHostAddress

        public static java.lang.String toHostAddress(java.lang.String... args)
        Parses the set command arguments into an IPv4 address. The directory must exist.
        Parameters:
        args - the command arguments
        Returns:
        the IP address represented by the first argument
